caption:
Most shops still track leads in a notebook, or a spreadsheet nobody opens after Tuesday.

Black Arrow OS is a free pipeline tool that runs in your browser.

Drag a lead from New to Contacted to Booked. Set a follow-up date the moment you hang up. Check one screen every Friday for cost per lead and return on ad spend.

It holds 25 contacts on one device, built lean so you see what a real pipeline looks like before you need anything bigger.

Load your next 25 leads this week and watch your follow-up rate change.

DM "TOOLS" for the link.

#LeadFollowUp #ServiceBusiness #FreeCRM #SmallBusinessTools #HomeServiceMarketing
rationale: Offers/Lead Magnets is under-served this cycle, and Black Arrow OS is the one published free tool this account hasn't yet featured as its own lead-magnet post, with interactive/tool-based magnets shown to convert best right now.
